job.title: AXWAY Secure Transport Technical Consultant
job.published: Published on 11 June 2026 · Position available immediately
job.desc.1: As an AXWAY Secure Transport Consultant, you deploy and manage secure file transfer solutions for our clients. You are the reference expert in this technology.
mission.1: Deploy, configure, and administer AXWAY Secure Transport
mission.7: Participate in pre-sales phases for MFT projects
profile.1: Bachelor's to Master's degree in computer science
profile.2: 3 to 6 years of experience with AXWAY Secure Transport or equivalent tools (IBM MQ FT, GoAnywhere)
profile.3: Knowledge of protocols SFTP, FTPS, AS2, HTTP/S
profile.5: Rigour and strong client service mindset
